summary: Facebook Dating Enhanced feature testing complete. All 12 features tested and working correctly. Dating page loads at /dating route with Italian UI matching Facebook Dating design. Profile cards display with name, age, Italian zodiac signs. Pass/Like buttons work correctly. Match modal appears with 40% probability showing Italian text. Reset profiles functionality works when all profiles viewed.
passed_tests: Dating page loads correctly at /dating route
Header displays 'Dating' title with menu and profile icons
Tab switching works between all tabs
Match notification banner appears with Italian text
Profile cards display correctly with name, age, zodiac sign in Italian
Pass button (X) advances to next profile
Match modal displays with Italian text ('Nuova amicizia!', 'vi piacete a vicenda')
Match modal has Italian buttons ('Invia un messaggio', 'Continua a sfogliare')
Feature buttons row displays all 5 features (La tua serie, In primo piano, Amicizia, Crush, Instagram)
Empty state shows Italian text ('Nessun altro profilo', 'Ricomincia da capo')
Reset profiles button works when all profiles viewed
Italian zodiac signs display correctly (Scorpione, Toro, etc.)
critical_code_review_comments: FacebookDatingEnhanced.jsx is well-structured with proper component separation
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Italian translations are complete and accurate
Match modal has 40% probability as specified
Profile cards use SAMPLE_PROFILES array (MOCKED - not backend API)
Zodiac signs properly translated to Italian using ZODIAC_SIGNS constant
seed_data_creation: None - uses SAMPLE_PROFILES array in component
context_for_next_testing_agent: Facebook Dating feature fully implemented with Italian UI. Dating profiles and matches use SAMPLE_PROFILES array (MOCKED, not backend API). Auth token can be set in localStorage as 'auth_token'. Mobile viewport 430x932 recommended for testing. All data-testid attributes present for automated testing.

mocked_apis_list: Dating profiles - uses SAMPLE_PROFILES array in component
Match notifications - uses SAMPLE_MATCHES array in component
